item.name: Pteranodon
item.description:
This flying scalekin can be seen scouting the lower reaches of the Churning Mists for insects and small birds.

[Suitable for printing on extra large canvases.]

fish.guide: If sketches in ancient bestiaries are to be believed, this scalekin has changed very little over the past several millennia, leading some to believe that it is of the same blood as the dragons. This has, however, been disproven, the flying lizards possessing about as much intelligence as the average ninki nanka.
